justification: Boundaries correct: 10 is heavy (sequential check < 10 means 10 falls through), 50 is freight (< 50 means 50 falls through). All 5 ACs covered with explicit AC-to-test mapping in acceptance_criteria_coverage. No external dependencies. No features beyond spec (WeightClass type is a trivial export, not an added feature). Confidence level 99 >= 85. 4 additional boundary tests (9.99, 49.99, 1000, negative) go beyond minimum without adding unrequested functionality.

observations.text: Each AC mapped 1:1 to a named test with clear notes explaining the branch logic
Boundary tests at 9.99 and 49.99 guard against off-by-one regressions
Assumptions section transparently calls out negative-weight and 1000 kg upper-bound inferences
Zero deviations and zero escalations — spec was followed exactly
Implementation approach (sequential < checks) naturally produces correct inclusive/exclusive boundaries without complex comparisons
